data.title: Stablecoin And Formula 1: Coinbase-Aston Martin Sponsorship
data.description:
Coinbase becomes official sponsor of Aston Martin in Formula 1, with payments made entirely in USDC. Crypto enters the world of racing.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/stablecoins/stablecoin-and-formula-1-coinbase-aston-martin-sponsorship/

data.title: Hive Digital Reports Significant Increase In Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to PANews, Hive Digital, a Nasdaq-listed company, released its performance report for the year ending December 31, 2024. Executive Chairman Frank Holmes announced that the company mined 1,770 BTC in 2024. By the end of the year, Hive Digital reached a new high in Bitcoin holdings, possessing 2,805 BTC valued at over $260 million. This marks a 263% increase compared to the $72 million in Bitcoin recorded on the balance sheet at the end of December 2023.

data.title: SHELL briefly broke through 0.5 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 30.05%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: GMGN market data shows that SHELL briefly broke through 0.5 USDT and is currently trading at 0.509 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 30.05%, and its market value is temporarily reported at 137 million US dollars.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 670 USDT with a 2.05% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 16, 2025, 10:44 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 670 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 670.219971 USDT, with a narrowed 2.05% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Swarms briefly broke through 0.045 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 28.15%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN market data shows that swarms briefly broke through 0.045 USDT and is now reported at 0.0473 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 28.15% and a market value of 46 million US dollars. According to previous news, the Launchpad Beta version of swarms has been launched, and users can tokenize AI Agents.

data.title: Hong Kong Asia Holdings purchased a bitcoin on February 13
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hong Kong Asia Holdings issued an announcement on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange stating that on February 13, 2025, Hong Kong Asia Holdings Group purchased a total of 1 unit of Bitcoin on the cryptocurrency trading platform on the open market, with a total cost of approximately US$96,150 (equivalent to approximately HK$750,000), which was paid from the Group's internal resources. (Jinshi)

data.title: TikTok may be a potential investment target for US sovereign wealth funds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Trump administration recently proposed to establish a US sovereign wealth fund (SWF) by 2026, and hinted that TikTok could be a potential investment target for the fund. This proposal has attracted widespread attention amid the challenges facing the US economy and high fiscal deficits. Although the idea seems attractive, analysts warn that without clear planning and governance mechanisms, the fund could do more harm than good to the market and the economy. (Jinshi)

data.title: CZ: I heard that the BNB Chain team is making a video tutorial on creating an AI agent on the chain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance founder CZ posted on the X platform, "According to Defillama data, BNB Chain's trading volume has increased by 66.63% month-on-month in the past 7 days. It all started with a video tutorial. I heard that the team is making a new video tutorial to teach people how to create an AI agent on BNB Chain."
